channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: ‘Boo hoo’: The New Yorkers who cheered Mamdani’s ‘tax the rich’ video - Gothamist
item.description:
1. ‘Boo hoo’: The New Yorkers who cheered Mamdani’s ‘tax the rich’ video  Gothamist
  2. New York’s Ultra-Rich Defend Citadel’s Griffin As Penthouse Dig Turns Personal  Bloomberg
  3. Mamdani eases tone as Citadel threat sparks push for pied-à-terre tax carveouts  Crain's New York
  4. New Taxes Helped Cool London’s Housing Market. Could That Happen in New York?  The New York Times
  5. Opinion | One of ‘the Rich’ Answers Mamdani’s Insult  WSJ

item.title: Reddit Stock Jumps As Q1 Results Beat Expectations - Investor's Business Daily
item.description:
1. Reddit Stock Jumps As Q1 Results Beat Expectations  Investor's Business Daily
  2. Reddit reports 69% jump in revenue, topping analyst estimates  CNBC
  3. Reddit Shares Jump 17% Premarket as Revenue Strength and EBITDA Growth Outshine Earnings Miss  Yahoo Finance
  4. People are finally using Reddit’s search  TechCrunch
  5. Reddit First-Quarter Profit, Sales Surge  WSJ

item.title: Cigna To Exit Obamacare In 2027, Affecting Coverage For 369,000 - Forbes
item.description:
1. Cigna To Exit Obamacare In 2027, Affecting Coverage For 369,000  Forbes

  3. Cigna to quit health insurance exchanges  Modern Healthcare
  4. Cigna to exit ACA market, pursue strategic alternatives for eviCore unit  Fierce Healthcare
  5. Cigna Profit Tops Analyst Estimates on Favorable Medical Costs  Bloomberg

item.title: Millions of Americans Might Be Eligible for Tax Refunds From Covid Era - WSJ
item.description:
1. Millions of Americans Might Be Eligible for Tax Refunds From Covid Era  WSJ

  4. Tax Breaks: The Surprise Refunds And Lingering Tax Bills Edition  Forbes
  5. Act Now: Deadline Fast Approaching for Potential IRS Refunds  Forvis Mazars US

item.title: New Wave of Lawsuits Hits OpenAI After Canada School Massacre - TipRanks
item.description:
1. New Wave of Lawsuits Hits OpenAI After Canada School Massacre  TipRanks

  4. Families of Tumbler Ridge shooting victims sue OpenAI and CEO Sam Altman  CNN
  5. Families of Canadian mass shooting victims sue OpenAI, CEO Altman in US court  Reuters

item.title: More popular restaurants close as situation worsens for Birmingham’s Pihakis Group - AL.com
item.description:
1. More popular restaurants close as situation worsens for Birmingham’s Pihakis Group  AL.com
  2. Bank sues Nick Pihakis over unpaid loan as another restaurant closes  WBRC
  3. Alabama restaurant group faces nearly $13 million in lawsuits and liens  WVTM
  4. Two Pihakis restaurants now closed in Homewood, including last Hero Diner  Bham Now
  5. Homewood Pihakis restaurants go dark as financial troubles deepen  The Business Journals

item.title: Stock Market News, April 30, 2026: Dow rises 790 points, S&P 500 and Nasdaq close at records as GDP data shows the U.S. economy continues to grow; Big Tech slips; oil falls back from four-year high; Alphabet shares jump as Meta falls - MarketWatch
item.description:
1. Stock Market News, April 30, 2026: Dow rises 790 points, S&P 500 and Nasdaq close at records as GDP data shows the U.S. economy continues to grow; Big Tech slips; oil falls back from four-year high; Alphabet shares jump as Meta falls  MarketWatch
  2. Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq rise after record highs as earnings roll in  Yahoo Finance
  3. Oil Price Hits Wartime High Above $120 a Barrel as Iran War Standoff Continues  The New York Times
  4. Tech stocks close out best month since start of Covid pandemic in 2020  CNBC
  5. Stocks Inch to New Records as Nvidia Strength Overcomes Consumer Weakness  WSJ
